name: advmat-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to Advanced Materials (Adv. Mater.), Wiley-VCH's flagship high-impact materials-science journal. Covers the materials-advance-plus-broad-impact scope gate, central-advance framing, multi-technique characterization rigor, cover-quality figures and the TOC graphic, Supporting Information partitioning, Wiley house style, the Communication-vs-Article length format, the impact-justifying cover letter, submission preflight, referee strategy, and revision. English docs with a bilingual zh-CN README.
